TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 福山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 部落概況與位置 == qalang na tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbalyun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwagiq nya spngan kahul babaw bsilung umi',spiyang zzik na qalanq Ulay. Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahl kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat biniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cingasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy ,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay bal qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhu Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhu krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kma qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga …..trang …ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhu Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw bal llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw nhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. 相傳始祖亞維.布納(Yawi.Puna') (Lkbuta')的祝福, (Lkbuta') (Lkbuta') (Yawi.Puna') (mtrang) (mtrang…)的泰雅族語加上an變成處所的名詞(mstranan), mstranan部落就想起亞維.布納(Yawi.Puna') .
S.PHON: == ******* == qalaŋ na tranan ɣa,kkiʔan na s~ɕquliq tajal,s~ɕms~ɕun s~ɕqu ɣaɣa ru pinʦ~ʨβaqan na qnxan tajal,ini ijal waħij pʦ~ʨjaqiħ na pmrruw zjuwaw kβaljun ,nanu qu rħizjal qjunam,inkjas~ɕan ħlaħuj ɣa mtas~ɕaw kinβalaj βetunux ,ɣiwal nqu qqalaŋ βetunux minnanak ijat ħmtan pkton na rħzjal.jas~ɕa qu tepuʦ~ʨiɣ minʔzju βe tħaqan na qalanq,maki s~ɕa jatux βalau qu *oŋ ms~ɕtranan,maki ħazi ***.**** mpajat ħkuj kore kins~ɕlaβaŋ nja ru *** meta kinwaɣiq nja s~ɕpŋan kaħul βaβaw βs~ɕiluŋ umiʔ,s~ɕpijaŋ zzik na qalanq ulaj. pinqzwan nqu mrħuw ta jawi.punaʔ ɣa,kaħl kinħulan lkotas~ɕ ta pins~ɕβkan, ru maɣan s~ɕqu kinqojat βiniq na lkβuta lru ras~ɕun nja kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja s~ɕi pkrajas~ɕ s~ɕqu ħlaħuj ,minteħuk s~ɕqu qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan qani ,qs~ɕuʔun nja ps~ɕurux qalaŋ βeħ ɣoŋ ʦ~ʨjaquŋ qas~ɕa, jas~ɕa qu qs~ɕu βalaj maki qalaŋ βeħ jatux na lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan la,,βaqaw ta kawas~ɕ **** ħazi mwaħ minʔizju s~ɕqani.s~ɕuruw rjax nas~ɕa ɣa, ktan nħa talaɣaj pizjux qquliħ tajal s~ɕi qopuʔ mutuʔ βaβaw na qs~ɕja lljuŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βal qs~ɕinuw njux mħmut mlataʔ mqjanux βeħ s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ ru rrɣjax,pqas~ɕun βalaj inluŋan nja mrħu jawi.punaʔ ini naɣa kziŋa nja mus~ɕa kmajal mrħu kraħu kinħolan nqu lkβuta,pqutan nja jawi.punaʔ qenu qas~ɕa ? nanu lalu na? s~ɕi kŋuraj mŋluŋ kma qu jawi.punaʔ mħa: traŋ rjax nas~ɕa ɣa *..traŋ *ini nja βaqi lalu nja ,ijat nja pnoŋan ana qutux uzi, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕi piraj ħmali nja mrħu lkβutaʔ mħa: ms~ɕtranan ,twaŋan nja an s~ɕuruw traŋ lɣa lalu na tajal" tranan " mħa la,ana mus~ɕa qalaŋ inu qalaŋ tajal ɣa ,pqzjuʔ s~ɕqu qalaŋ mtranan ɣa mis~ɕuw βal lluŋun nħa rħzjal na ħβujaw qquliq tajal ru qs~ɕinuw nħjun nqu mβlaq qqojat na qalaŋ ,mwaħ s~ɕqu tlelu mlaħaŋ lɣa "xus~ɕan s~ɕoŋ"s~ɕon nħa la, ana βetaq s~ɕoni qu lalu na qalaŋ la. ******.**(jawi.punaʔ) (lkβutaʔ)***, (lkβutaʔ) (lkβutaʔ) (jawi.punaʔ) (mtraŋ) (mtraŋ*)*******an*******(ms~ɕtranan), ms~ɕtranan*******.**(jawi.punaʔ) .
S.FORM: == 部落概況與位置 == qalang na tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbalyun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwagiq nya spngan kahul babaw bsilung umi',spiyang zzik na qalanq Ulay. Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahl kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat biniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cingasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy ,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay bal qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhu Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhu krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kma qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga …..trang …ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhu Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw bal llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw nhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. 相傳始祖亞維.布納(Yawi.Puna') (Lkbuta')的祝福, (Lkbuta') (Lkbuta') (Yawi.Puna') (mtrang) (mtrang…)的泰雅族語加上an變成處所的名詞(mstranan), mstranan部落就想起亞維.布納(Yawi.Puna') .
S.PHON: == ******* == qalaŋ na tranan ɣa,kkiʔan na s~ɕquliq tajal,s~ɕms~ɕun s~ɕqu ɣaɣa ru pinʦ~ʨβaqan na qnxan tajal,ini ijal waħij pʦ~ʨjaqiħ na pmrruw zjuwaw kβaljun ,nanu qu rħizjal qjunam,inkjas~ɕan ħlaħuj ɣa mtas~ɕaw kinβalaj βetunux ,ɣiwal nqu qqalaŋ βetunux minnanak ijat ħmtan pkton na rħzjal.jas~ɕa qu tepuʦ~ʨiɣ minʔzju βe tħaqan na qalanq,maki s~ɕa jatux βalau qu *oŋ ms~ɕtranan,maki ħazi ***.**** mpajat ħkuj kore kins~ɕlaβaŋ nja ru *** meta kinwaɣiq nja s~ɕpŋan kaħul βaβaw βs~ɕiluŋ umiʔ,s~ɕpijaŋ zzik na qalanq ulaj. pinqzwan nqu mrħuw ta jawi.punaʔ ɣa,kaħl kinħulan lkotas~ɕ ta pins~ɕβkan, ru maɣan s~ɕqu kinqojat βiniq na lkβuta lru ras~ɕun nja kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal nja s~ɕi pkrajas~ɕ s~ɕqu ħlaħuj ,minteħuk s~ɕqu qalaŋ ms~ɕtranan qani ,qs~ɕuʔun nja ps~ɕurux qalaŋ βeħ ɣoŋ ʦ~ʨjaquŋ qas~ɕa, jas~ɕa qu qs~ɕu βalaj maki qalaŋ βeħ jatux na lljuŋ ms~ɕtranan la,,βaqaw ta kawas~ɕ **** ħazi mwaħ minʔizju s~ɕqani.s~ɕuruw rjax nas~ɕa ɣa, ktan nħa talaɣaj pizjux qquliħ tajal s~ɕi qopuʔ mutuʔ βaβaw na qs~ɕja lljuŋ ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj βal qs~ɕinuw njux mħmut mlataʔ mqjanux βeħ s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ ru rrɣjax,pqas~ɕun βalaj inluŋan nja mrħu jawi.punaʔ ini naɣa kziŋa nja mus~ɕa kmajal mrħu kraħu kinħolan nqu lkβuta,pqutan nja jawi.punaʔ qenu qas~ɕa ? nanu lalu na? s~ɕi kŋuraj mŋluŋ kma qu jawi.punaʔ mħa: traŋ rjax nas~ɕa ɣa *..traŋ *ini nja βaqi lalu nja ,ijat nja pnoŋan ana qutux uzi, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕi piraj ħmali nja mrħu lkβutaʔ mħa: ms~ɕtranan ,twaŋan nja an s~ɕuruw traŋ lɣa lalu na tajal" tranan " mħa la,ana mus~ɕa qalaŋ inu qalaŋ tajal ɣa ,pqzjuʔ s~ɕqu qalaŋ mtranan ɣa mis~ɕuw βal lluŋun nħa rħzjal na ħβujaw qquliq tajal ru qs~ɕinuw nħjun nqu mβlaq qqojat na qalaŋ ,mwaħ s~ɕqu tlelu mlaħaŋ lɣa "xus~ɕan s~ɕoŋ"s~ɕon nħa la, ana βetaq s~ɕoni qu lalu na qalaŋ la. ******.**(jawi.punaʔ) (lkβutaʔ)***, (lkβutaʔ) (lkβutaʔ) (jawi.punaʔ) (mtraŋ) (mtraŋ*)*******an*******(ms~ɕtranan), ms~ɕtranan*******.**(jawi.punaʔ) .
